title: Lucid widely misses earnings expectations, forecasts slowing EV growth in 2026
text: Lucid reported Q4 2025 results that widely missed earnings expectations. The company delivered 15,841 vehicles in 2025 but faced headwinds from slowing EV market demand. Management forecasted slower growth in 2026 relative to previous expectations, citing macroeconomic headwinds and increased competition. The earnings miss reflected production challenges, pricing pressures, and higher-than-expected operating costs. Despite achieving roughly doubled production in 2025, the company remained unprofitable with significant cash burn. Analysts downgraded their revenue and profitability forecasts for 2026 and beyond following the miss.
